calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Aleksandr A. Volkov, Esq. of L/O of Aleksander Volkov, Tel. 415.987.7000, for Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LEONID ZINCHIK's Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
